title: ennoia #1771
definition:
1) the act of thinking, consideration, meditation
 2) a thought, notion, conception
 3) mind, understanding, will, manner of feeling, and thinking
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) the act of thinking, consideration, meditation
 2) a thought, notion, conception
 3) mind, understanding, will, manner of feeling, and thinking

    NASB:  thinking, thoughtfulness, i.e. moral understanding:
